review_reason: Document is a Letter of Intent (pre-contractual), not a fully executed contract; parties are unnamed, signature is illegible, and multiple critical fields contain ranges or vague language rather than definitive values.

parties.evidence: a potential business relationship between our respective organizations ... [signature illegible] Director of Partnerships

effective_date.evidence: we anticipate will occur sometime in Q2 or early Q3

term_length.evidence: a term of approximately eighteen months to two years, subject to mutual performance reviews

payment_terms.evidence: payment to be structured in a manner acceptable to both parties' finance teams

total_value.evidence: We have discussed a figure in the range of fifty to seventy-five thousand dollars, contingent upon final scope approval and board sign-off
